title: Integration recipe (Action) keeps changing to previous version
excerpt: I am trying to build an Integration / Automation. After defining the Trigger and Action for the Integration Feature it looks fine. However when I view the App and select the Feature again the Action is reset to an Action…

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to build an Integration / Automation. After defining the Trigger and Action for the Integration Feature it looks fine. However when I view the App and select the Feature again the Action is reset to an Action used earlier.

Also, I don’t see how to remove a custom Action. Any ideas?

See: https://www.loom.com/share/cb2e3db6eda248dea835bd6ba7855778

posts.author: VladMonday (Vlad Mystetskyi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @basdebruin !

This is a bug, that we are aware of. It is in our backlog and will be fixed in the upcoming week. We will notify you, when it will be fixed.

Regarding ability to delete an action/trigger - it is not possible now, but we are working on this feature during this iteration. For now you can just rename unused ones (add “DELETED” into the name), so you will be able to easily find them and remove, when the delete feature will be released.

Thanks for the feedback!
